release_notes:
-  Lieder Schatz, added 1 verse of syllabized text for all songs so if melody is available it can be played.
(NOTE:) The syllabized text/lyrics might not show correctly for all songs as it is currently being worked on.
-  Finally! Prompts when new updates are available. Now when there is a new update available you will get a prompt when launching DSD. This feature was requested a lot. I finally found a simple way to implement it without having to pay for an online host or website.
-  Other minor bug fixes and corrections
